explanation: The user wants to try another mug, implying a new mug should be picked up instead of the current one. Currently, mug_0 is dirty and inside a cabinet. Since the user is referring to a new mug, we introduce mug_1 (as it is not already in the discussed_objects list). The robot should pick up mug_1 to fulfill the request. No other actions are needed as the instruction is to obtain a new mug.
